title: Mystery Milk
description: Adds many new types of milk.
body:
This mod adds several new types of milk for different mobs in Minecraft.

  • Squid Milk - Gives you blindness. Obtained by milking squids.
  • Slime Milk - Gives you a jump boost. Obtained by milking slimes.
  • Ravager Milk - Gives you regen, strength, and a bad omen. Can also be used for cakes. Obtained by milking the Ravager Beast.
  • Phantom Milk - Gives you night vision. Obtained by milking a phantom.
  • Spider Milk - Gives you poison. Obtained by milking a spider or cave spider.
